ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "chr" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (+ or -) */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene in base pairs */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description or function of the gene */,
  "gene_ontology_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene ontology for functional annotation */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Family or group the gene belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression record */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene being measured */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID for the associated sample */,
  "vprtta_rna_b6_q30_sam" INTEGER /* Reads count from the RNA sequencing analysis */,
  "rpm" REAL /* Reads Per Million for the gene */,
  "rpkm" REAL /* Reads Per Kilobase Million used for normalization */,
  "log2_rpkm" REAL /* Log base 2 of RPKM value for statistical analysis */,
  "tpm" REAL /* Transcripts Per Million for the gene */,
  "fpkm" REAL /* Fragments Per Kilobase Million for the gene */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for differential expression */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value (FDR) for multiple testing correction */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change in expression between conditions */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample was collected from */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cells in the sample */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state of the sample */,
  "experiment_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental condition */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level of the dataset */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Textual description or annotation for the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "annotation_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotation_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_source_id") REFERENCES annotation_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
